Hero.tagline: Head of Paid Media + AI builder
Hero.headline: I run USD 2M+ in ad spend and code my own tools.
Hero.description: 5+ years leading paid media across Chile, Brazil, and Mexico — USD 2M+ managed, up to 14x ROAS, partnerships with Scotiabank, BCI, and Uber generating USD 300K in direct revenue. What sets me apart: I also build the software that automates the operation.
Hero.punchline: I don't hire a growth team: I am the team.

About.title: About
About.kicker: A journalist who ended up building AI SaaS
About.p1: Journalist by training (UNAB, academic distinction) who ended up building AI SaaS. Five years leading paid media across LATAM — USD 2M+ invested, up to 14x ROAS, teams in Chile, Brazil, and Mexico, partnerships with Scotiabank, Uber, BCI, Sura, and Consorcio.
About.p2: In 2023 I stopped asking the agency. I learned FastAPI, Next.js, and the Claude API because it was the fastest path to do my job better. Today I run RocketMonk — a multi-tenant SaaS that connects 19 professional APIs (Google Ads MCC, GA4, Meta, Stripe, Anthropic, KIE.ai among others) and automates the operation I've led for years.
About.p3: I also build automations, corporate sites, executive dashboards, and internal tools. The difference with a traditional dev is that I know what decision needs to be made before writing the query. The difference with a traditional marketing leader is that I implement it myself.

Stack.title: Stack
Stack.kicker: Marketing, engineering, and everything in between

Certifications.title: Certifications
Certifications.kicker: 13 active certifications across Anthropic, Google, Meta, TikTok, LinkedIn, Shopify, and HubSpot

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.kicker: If you lead a marketing team or are building something with AI, let's talk.

Footer.tagline: Head of Paid Media + AI builder · Santiago, Chile
